keep_active_when: lead is already referenced in harvest-log.csv
lead clearly maps to an existing resource
lead contains primary or credible institutional source links
lead is likely to generate a real resource update soon
archive_when: lead is possibly useful later but not high priority
lead is partially duplicative of a stronger retained lead
lead is historically informative but not worth active queue space
prune_when: lead is predominantly sensational framing with weak sourcing
lead is off-topic for the source corpus
lead is a lower-quality duplicate of stronger retained material
lead is not meaningfully actionable for a current or planned resource
